summary: Classic Dead show captured with superb sound quality; Brent and Phil on fire while Jerry shifts stage sides.
review: Both reviewers rave about this performance, calling it a classic show with great‑sounding audio and thanking the engineers for the clear mix. The crowd notes fiery playing from Brent (keys) and Phil (bass), plus an energetic stage move by Jerry, and even highlights a nice jam at the end of the set.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews praise both musical performance and audio fidelity; limited detail on recording source keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the sound as great/clear and thank engineers Richie and Andrew, indicating a high‑quality mix with no noted flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Positive remarks about overall set flow; reviewers mention an enjoyable jam at the end and feel every song was solid.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Moved from left side to right side during the show, noted as a memorable stage shift.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent (keyboard) praised for being on fire during his performance.
